backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing a social platform with user profiles, posts, comments, chat, study groups, forum, and moderation features. Includes blob storage mixin, access control, content moderation, and a 600MB video size limit.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the implementation of improved error messaging for study group creation failures due to content moderation in StudyGroupsPage.tsx.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including components, pages, hooks, and utilities with details on authentication, profile management, post composition, study groups, chat, and error handling.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS styles with OKLCH color system using red/white primary colors (hue 15) for light and dark modes, replacing previous purple/blue theme.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with page title "ICSE Crowd" and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app component with theme provider, lazy-loaded page routing (home, feed, study groups, forum, chat, moderation), authentication state management, and loading fallbacks.
frontend/src/components/FeedPostCard.tsx: Memoized post card component displaying author profiles with avatars, post content with media attachments, like/comment functionality, and normalized IC error handling. Shows "Guest" fallback for users without profiles.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Footer component displaying copyright notice, caffeine.ai attribution with heart icon, and developer credit "Developed by Aryan Shinde".
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Navigation header with authentication controls, page navigation buttons, admin moderation access, profile dropdown, and toast notifications for login errors with improved button states during authentication.
frontend/src/components/PostComposer.tsx: React component for creating posts with text content and optional image, video, or document attachments. Includes file validation, preview generation, upload progress tracking, and error handling.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: Modal dialog component for first-time user profile creation, collecting name, email, and optional academic details with form validation.
frontend/src/components/StudyGroupChatDi: Real-time chat dialog for study groups with message display, auto-scrolling, polling for new messages every 3 seconds, and message sending functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that manages the backend actor instance based on Internet Identity authentication state, initializing with admin token and invalidating dependent queries on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and AuthClient lifecycle with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Collection of React Query hooks for data fetching and mutations including user profiles, posts, comments, likes, study groups, and reports with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining light and dark theme color schemes using OKLCH color space for consistent UI theming.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient, InternetIdentityProvider, and renders the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/ChatPage.tsx: Chat interface page displaying a contact list and message composer, allowing users to select contacts and send messages via the sendMessage mutation.
frontend/src/pages/FeedPage.tsx: Social feed page that displays posts sorted by timestamp, with PostComposer for creating new posts and FeedPostCard components for rendering posts with like and comment functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ForumPage.tsx: Q&A forum page with a dialog for creating forum posts (subject and content), currently showing an empty state placeholder for questions.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page featuring hero section, platform features showcase, login/profile creation prompts, and contact email with copy-to-clipboard functionality.
frontend/src/pages/ModerationPage.tsx: Moderation dashboard displaying reports in tabs (pending/reviewed/resolved) with statistics cards and actions to review reports and manage content.
frontend/src/pages/StudyGroupsPage.tsx: Study groups page allowing users to create and join study groups, with chat functionality for group members and content moderation error handling.
frontend/src/utils/icErrors.ts: Utility function to extract and normalize readable error messages from IC canister errors, handling patterns like Runtime.trap messages, reject text, and agent errors.
frontend/src/utils/mediaGuards.ts: Provides validation and URL extraction helpers for post media attachments (video, image, document), including file type validation, size limits (600MB for video), and file size formatting utilities.
frontend/src/utils/principal.ts: Safe wrapper function to convert principal text strings into Principal instances, returning null on invalid input or conversion failure.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: URL parameter parsing and sessionStorage persistence utilities for both query strings and hash-based routing, with functions to extract, store, retrieve, and clear parameters (including sensitive data cleanup).
frontend/src/utils/userDisplay.ts: User display utilities that derive initials from usernames for avatar fallbacks and provide consistent fallback labels for unknown/missing users.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom OKLCH color variables for theming (including sidebar, chart, and semantic colors), extended animations, border radius tokens, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata documenting ICSE Crowd as a full-stack ICP social/academic platform with React frontend, Motoko backend, role-based access control, and known issues including authentication delays, missing endpoints for chat/comments/friends, and non-stable storage.
